/nix/store/a0d7m3zn9p2dfa1h7ag9h2wzzr2w25sn-gcc-wrapper-14.2.1.20250322/bin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ps2recomp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ps2recomp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps2recomp.dir/src/iso/udf_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps2recomp.dir/src/elf/elf_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps2recomp.dir/src/mips/disasm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ps2recomp.dir/src/recomp/recompiler.cpp.o -o ps2recomp
